name: template-meeting-request
description: Retrieve email composing guidelines for meeting requests. Returns structured policy (required elements, tone, structure, constraints, example) that you use as instructions when composing the email — do NOT send the policy itself to the recipient. Supports three actions: 'generate' retrieves the policy (checks KG for customizations first); 'save' stores a custom policy in the knowledge graph; 'reset' reverts to the built-in default policy.

inputs.sender_name: string? (required for generate — the name of the person requesting the meeting, typically the CEO)
inputs.proposed_times: string? (required for generate — comma-separated proposed times)
inputs.meeting_purpose: string? (optional for generate — reason for meeting)
inputs.meeting_duration: string? (optional for generate — e.g. '30 minutes', '1 hour')
inputs.meeting_location: string? (optional for generate — e.g. 'Zoom', 'in-person at HQ')
inputs.custom_policy: string? (required for save — the policy to store, as JSON or plain-text guidelines)

outputs.guidelines: object? (the email policy: required_elements, tone, structure, constraints, example)
outputs.context: object? (the provided variables for the LLM to use when composing)
